PROP-baseauction-inv-029.text: performUpkeep must process feeAggregator.transferForSwap before iterating eligible assets to ensure balance.
PROP-baseauction-inv-029.assertion: transferForSwap() called before any auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp

locations.note: transferForSwap ordering relative to s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp (line 353) is the invariant
